channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Friday, May 22, 2026
item.description: The dominant thread this Friday is acceleration on two fronts that directly intersect your work: AI is moving from product announcements to civilisational-scale claims — Google DeepMind's CEO used the word 'singularity' at I/O this week, and the AI backlash is quietly becoming a ...
